confidence_reason: Clean architecture with interface-based abstractions, no circular dependencies, all external dependencies have clear migration paths, single seam with no coordination complexity

non_blocking_issues.description: Image deletion not implemented on product deletion
non_blocking_issues.evidence: Delete.aspx.cs:34-36 calls RemoveCatalogItem but no image cleanup
non_blocking_issues.mitigation: Add image deletion logic in modern API, cleanup orphaned images during migration
Add JWT authentication to modern API image upload endpoint

non_blocking_issues.description: HiLo sequence pattern incompatibility with modern databases
non_blocking_issues.evidence: CatalogItemHiLoGenerator.cs:19 uses SQL Server-specific NEXT VALUE FOR
non_blocking_issues.mitigation: Use auto-increment PRIMARY KEY or UUID in modern database

non_blocking_issues.description: Missing transaction management for multi-step operations
non_blocking_issues.evidence: Image update and DB update are separate operations (not atomic) in Create.aspx.cs:73-78 and Edit.aspx.cs:81-88
non_blocking_issues.mitigation: Implement proper transaction scope or compensating actions in modern API

non_blocking_issues.description: No file size validation on image upload
non_blocking_issues.evidence: PicUploader.asmx:32-62 validates format but not size
non_blocking_issues.mitigation: Add file size limit (e.g., 5MB max) in modern API

risks.mitigation: Use IImageService abstraction, test thoroughly, maintain backup of original images
Export data with existing IDs, use IDENTITY_INSERT or map to new ID sequence
Implement comprehensive auth tests, document JWT token flow
